Career

Experience

Sr. Data Analyst / BI Developer

Jan 2025 – Present

Northwestern Mutual · Remote

  • Designed end-to-end data pipelines on AWS using Glue, Snowflake, Spark, and Delta Lake, reducing nightly batch processing from 4 hours to 1 hour.
  • Migrated legacy SSRS reports to Power BI and Tableau dashboards, improving performance by 30% and adoption by 40%.
  • Built scalable Power BI semantic models with DAX, tabular modeling, row-level security, and incremental refresh for secure self-service analytics.
  • Developed ELT workflows using Spark SQL and PySpark to transform datasets from S3, RDS, and Redshift for financial analytics and executive reporting.
  • Implemented dbt and Python validation frameworks, automating data quality checks and CI/CD to improve accuracy from 75% to 90%.
  • Integrated SAP ERP, Oracle ERP, and Salesforce into the AWS platform using Glue and Spark for unified enterprise reporting.
  • Optimized data models with star schema design and dimensional modeling, cutting reporting cycles from 5 days to 1 day.
  • Developed executive-level financial dashboards for Budget vs. Actuals and operational KPIs, enabling leadership to monitor performance in near real time.
  • Established CI/CD pipelines for dbt models and Power BI deployments, reducing deployment errors by 50%.

Sr. Data Analyst

Jan 2024 – Dec 2024

Barclays · Remote

  • Designed end-to-end pipelines using Microsoft Fabric Data Factory to ingest on-premises SQL Server and Oracle data into the Fabric Lakehouse.
  • Implemented distributed transformations using Spark and PySpark within Fabric to process large-scale financial datasets and optimize batch performance.
  • Built interactive Power BI dashboards for financial KPIs, revenue forecasts, credit risk metrics, and loan portfolio performance.
  • Automated legacy Excel-based financial models with Python, improving operational efficiency by 40%.
  • Developed complex SQL queries, PL/SQL procedures, and reconciliation workflows to support regulatory reporting and analytical workloads.
  • Implemented enterprise data governance, metadata management, cataloging, and lineage tracking using Microsoft Purview to ensure compliance.
  • Established automated data validation frameworks using SQL and Python to detect anomalies and ensure accuracy for compliance and risk reporting.
  • Optimized existing Power BI reports and underlying SQL queries, reducing load times by 35% and improving user experience across departments.
  • Partnered with finance, risk, and compliance teams in Agile sprints to translate business requirements into data models, dashboards, and UAT test plans.

Business Intelligence Developer

Jun 2020 – Dec 2022

Accenture · India

  • Designed and developed interactive Power BI dashboards and executive analytics for compliance, risk, and financial operations.
  • Built complex SQL queries using joins, CTEs, window functions, and stored procedures across Oracle, SQL Server, and PostgreSQL.
  • Supported ETL pipelines using Azure Data Factory and IBM DataStage, integrating structured and semi-structured data into Azure Data Lake and Synapse.
  • Developed enterprise data warehouse solutions using star and snowflake schemas, fact/dimension tables, and source-to-target mappings.
  • Published and managed reports in Power BI Service, implementing workspace security, row-level security, and performance optimization with UAT via JIRA.
  • Created data quality and reconciliation frameworks using SQL and Python to validate source-to-target accuracy and ensure compliance with business rules.
  • Tuned slow-running SQL queries and Power BI data models, reducing report refresh times by 25% and improving dashboard reliability.
  • Led migration of legacy SSRS and Excel-based reports to Power BI, standardizing report templates and reducing manual effort by 30%.
  • Mentored junior analysts and developers on SQL best practices, Power BI development standards, and data modeling techniques to improve team delivery quality.
